summary: Complete testing of Programs/Courses feature. All 19 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified /courses page with filters, /programs/:slug detail page, enquiry form modal, and copy protection.
critical_code_review_comments: programs_routes.py: Proper MongoDB _id exclusion in all queries (line 121, 128-129, 209)
programs_routes.py: Admin verification checks admin_sessions first, then user_sessions, then JWT (lines 88-104)
ProgramDetail.js: Enquiry form has all required data-testid attributes for testing
Copy protection: user-select:none on body verified working
seed_data_creation: Test programs created during admin CRUD tests (auto-cleaned)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Programs feature fully functional. Key endpoints: GET /api/programs (with optional ?domain= filter), GET /api/programs/:slug, POST /api/programs/enquiry, POST /api/admin/programs (admin), PUT /api/admin/programs/:id (admin), DELETE /api/admin/programs/:id (admin), GET /api/admin/programs/enquiries (admin). Frontend routes: /courses (listing with filters), /programs/:slug (detail with enquiry modal). 6 seeded programs exist with domains: research, ai_tech, competition, entrepreneurship, healthcare, summer.

backend_api_tests.test_get_program_by_slug: PASS - Returns specific program by slug
backend_api_tests.test_admin_create_program: PASS - Creates program with auto-generated slug
backend_api_tests.test_admin_get_enquiries: PASS - Returns enquiries list with pagination
backend_api_tests.test_program_has_required_fields: PASS - All programs have required fields

frontend_ui_tests.filter_buttons_exist: PASS - All filter buttons present (All, Competitions, Research, Internships, AI & Tech, Healthcare, Summer)
frontend_ui_tests.filter_functionality: PASS - Research filter shows only 1 research program
frontend_ui_tests.enquiry_form_fields: PASS - All form fields have data-testid attributes
frontend_ui_tests.enquiry_submission: PASS - Form submits and shows success message

feature_verification.programs_listing: VERIFIED - /courses shows all programs with domain tags and filters
feature_verification.domain_filtering: VERIFIED - Filter buttons filter programs by domain via API
feature_verification.program_detail: VERIFIED - /programs/:slug shows overview, highlights, mentor, enquiry CTA
feature_verification.enquiry_form: VERIFIED - Modal opens, form submits, success message shown
feature_verification.admin_crud: VERIFIED - Create, update, delete programs with admin auth
